title: NoCreepers Tekkit Classic Revival
description: Rediscover the magic of classic Minecraft with NoCreepers Tekkit Revival! This modpack brings back the nostalgic feel of the original Tekkit experience, with a fresh twist.
body:
Whether you’re a veteran player yearning for those unforgettable days or a newcomer eager to explore what made Tekkit so special, this modpack has everything you need. From intricate machinery and automation to expansive exploration and creativity, NoCreepers Tekkit Revival is designed to immerse you in the beloved world of Minecraft as it was meant to be. Dive in, relive the adventure, and build your empire.

I'm commited to getting as close to Tekkit as possible on 1.21.1 and will be updating the Mods list as soon as they are released.  It's currently missing Item Alchemy and Pipes but all other machinery like quarry's and furnaces are in place and working.
